title: cephaelis bieleri
intro: Cephaelis bieleri, also known as the wild coffee plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, Cephaelis bieleri has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its stimulant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to the presence of caffeine and other xanthines. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fatigue, headaches, and fever, as well as to improve digestion and boost energy levels. Cephaelis bieleri can be prepared into various herbal products, such as tea, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed for their medicinal and stimulant properties.
